name: Oatmeal Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the sugar, shortening, and oats in a large bowl. Blend well.
2. Stir in brown sugar and mix until evenly distributed.
3. Using a pastry blender, cut in shortening until it is evenly incorporated into the mixture.
4. Stir in oats and mix thoroughly.
5. Transfer to a large airtight container and label as Oatmeal Cookie Mix.
6. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 10 to 12 weeks.
7. Makes about 24 cups of mix.
8. VARIATION: Use 8 cups unbleached flour instead of 4 cups unbleached flour and 4 cups whole wheat flour.
